steps.title: Determine medians for both groups
steps.content:
Group A has 9 players (odd count) → median is the 5th score. Group B has 11 players (odd count) → median is the 6th score. List scores in order for each group based on their frequency distributions.

Group A scores (9 players): 2, 3, 4, 4, 5, 6, 6, 6, 9. The 5th score is 5.
Group B scores (11 players): 5, 5, 5, 5, 6, 6, 8, 8, 9, 10, 10. The 6th score is 6.

steps.title: Calculate the difference
steps.content: Subtract the median of Group A (5) from the median of Group B (6): $6 - 5 = 1$.
